video.title: AgentFactory Part 3: Business Domain Agent Workflows — Announcement

brand.name: AgentFactory
brand.tagline: AI-First Future — BUILD & MONETIZE DIGITAL FTEs

music_bed.description: Subtle bass drone / ambient tech pulse — present but not dominant

audio.mix_priority: SFX above music bed; nothing competes with text readability

scenes.visuals: Terminal-style typing reveal. 'AgentFactory' types first, then ': PART 3' types with emphasis. Blinking cursor on '3_'. 'NOW LIVE' badge fades in top-right corner (silver accent).

scenes.subtext: Parts 1 & 2 taught you to build AI. Part 3 teaches you to deploy it in real business functions.
scenes.visuals: 'AI Infrastructure' appears → arrow animates downward → 'Enterprise Deployment' slides in. Subtitle fades in below after 1s delay.

scenes.subtext: Not technical capability. Professional judgment encoded into AI workflows.
scenes.visuals: Monospace quote with blinking cursor, silver accent text on dark navy. Subtitle appears 1s after quote (staggered reveal).

3x2 grid of enterprise function cards (CFO Office, Legal & Compliance, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain, HR & Operations, Innovation Lab), staggered fade-in at 100ms intervals. After grid establishes (~2s), cards shrink slightly and deliverables checklist slides up from bottom:
- ✓ Production-Ready SKILL.md Libraries
- ✓ Governance Frameworks (10-80-10 Rhythm)
- ✓ MCP Integration
- ✓ Multi-Jurisdiction Compliance
Large headline with blinking cursor. Short URL in monospace below. Full path (docs/Business-Domain-Agent-Workflows) lives in video description and post caption — not on screen.

voiceover.rationale: 80%+ of social views are muted. All messaging conveyed through on-screen text.

captions.rationale: Not needed — all messaging is on-screen text. Video works with sound off.

cutdown.reframe_notes: Center-align all text. Crop top/bottom of grid scene in scope-deliverables.

thumbnail.description: Frame from Scene 1 — 'AgentFactory: PART 3_' with cursor visible
